data.title: Franklin Financial's 2025 Q4 results show net income of $6.0 million, a 12.9% increase. Yearly results reflect $21.2 million net income, up 91.2%. Total assets in 2025 were $2.239 billion, loans totaled $1.541 billion. The Bank paid off $65.0 million in brokered deposits. A dividend of $0.33 per share was declared. Management claims the Bank as "well-capitalized." Nonaccrual loans totaled $8.5 million on Dec 31, 2025. Net interest income for Q4 2025 was $18.6 million.
data.description: Franklin Financial Services Corporation, the parent company of F&M Trust, reported their fourth quarter 2025 and year-to-date 2025 results. In Q4 2025, they had a net income of $6.0 million, up 12.9% from the previous quarter. Assets under management were $1.421 billion, with total assets at $2.239 billion, up 1.9% from 2024. Net loans totaled $1.541 billion, a 11.6% increase from the previous year. Total deposits were $1.836 billion with growth primarily from interest-bearing accounts. The Corporation redeemed $9.0 million of their subordinate notes and had borrowings of $200.0 million from FHLB. Shareholders' equity increased by $30.5 million. Nonaccrual loans totaled $8.5 million on December 31, 2025. The Bank had an effective income tax rate of 19.2% for Q4 2025. Year-to-date income in 2025 was $21.2 million, an increase of 91.2% from 2024. Net interest income was $18.6 million for Q4 2025, up 23.3% from Q4 2024. Noninterest income totaled $4.7 million, with an increase in wealth management fees. Noninterest expense was $15.5 million, up 8.4%. The Corporation's stock is trading under the symbol FRAF on NASDAQ. Over the year, there was an increase in earnings, deposits, loans, and fee income, showing positive financial growth for Franklin Financial Services Corporation.

data.title: QT Imaging is moving from OTCQB to Nasdaq; shares to trade under "QTI" starting tomorrow.
data.description: A medical device company, QT Imaging Holdings, Inc. (QTIH), specializing in radiation-free imaging technology for breast health management, has secured approval to migrate its common stock from OTCQB to the Nasdaq Capital Market. Trading under the symbol "QTI" on Nasdaq Stock Market LLC is set to begin tomorrow. This move signifies an important step for QT Imaging, opening up new opportunities for growth and exposure in the market.

data.title: Centerspace to report Q4 2025 results on February 17 after market close, with conference call on February 18 at 10 am ET. Visit Benzinga.com for more info.
data.description: In Minneapolis, Centerspace (NYSE: CSR) has announced that it will be sharing its financial performance for the quarter and year ending on December 31, 2025. The results will be disclosed after the market closes on Tuesday, February 17, 2026. Subsequently, there will be a conference call held by management on Wednesday, February 18, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss the outcomes. Those interested can join the conference call using the following details: Live webcast link: https://events.q4inc.com/attendee/297674377, or through an Operator Assisted Dial-In at +1 646 844 6383 (United States - Local). This information was detailed in a press release available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: StandardAero to have a secondary offering of 50M shares by Carlyle Group Inc. and GIC, priced at $0.01 per share.
data.description: Scottsdale, Arizona - StandardAero, Inc. revealed that two of its stockholders, linked to The Carlyle Group Inc. and GIC, plan to sell a total of 50,000,000 shares of the company's common stock, each valued at $0.01, through an underwritten public offering. The announcement was made as part of StandardAero's shelf registration statement lodged with the Securities and Exchange Commission. (Total number of shares: 50,000,000; Stockholders involved: The Carlyle Group Inc. and GIC; Stock value: $0.01 per share)

data.title: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. declares $0.50 dividend/share, payable on Feb 27, 2026. Q4 results to be reported on Feb 18, 2026.
data.description: In Northbrook, Illinois, CF Industries Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CF) announced a dividend of $0.50 per share on its common stock. This dividend is scheduled to be paid on February 27, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 13, 2026. Moreover, the company disclosed that it will release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 after the market closes on Wednesday, February 18, 2026. A conference call is planned to review these results.

data.description: TechTarget, Inc. (Nasdaq: TTGT) - known as Informa TechTarget - is set to disclose its financial figures for the last quarter and full-year concluded on December 31, 2025. data.title: Fed may begin cutting rates to ease inflation; banks & homebuilders react. Timing of cuts crucial for stocks. Lower rates may boost bank profits.
data.description: The Federal Reserve is hinting at cutting interest rates as a response to cooling inflation. This shift could impact equity markets, particularly rate-sensitive sectors like banks and homebuilders. Investors are keen on the timing and reasons behind the potential cuts rather than the cuts themselves. Interest rates influence stock prices by affecting future earnings and economic activity through credit costs. Banks, like JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE: JPM) and Bank of America Corp. (NYSE: BAC), have been facing profit constraints due to rising deposit costs and slowing loan growth. Lower rates could stabilize net interest margins for banks, potentially reshaping the industry landscape. It is crucial for traders to anticipate policy changes in advance, as the rationale behind the rate cuts can indicate economic health or stress, significantly impacting cyclical stocks like those in the banking and housing sectors.

data.title: Lineage, Inc. reports tax treatment of $0.52 cash distribution per share with various classifications for 2025.
data.description: Lineage, Inc. (NASDAQ: LINE), headquartered in Novi, Michigan, recently disclosed the tax treatment of its 2025 distributions. The distributions per share of the Company's common stock (CUSIP 53566V106) will be detailed on Form 1099-DIV as follows: A cash distribution of $0.52 per share was issued on January 21, 2025, with the record date set as December 31, 2024. This distribution comprises an ordinary dividend, return of capital, qualified dividend, and Section 199A dividend. Lineage, Inc. stands as the largest global temperature-controlled warehouse REIT in the world.

data.title: Seagate exceeds Q2 earnings expectations with $3.11 EPS and $2.83 billion revenue, beating estimates by 10.52% and $100 million respectively.
data.description: Seagate Technology Holdings Plc.'s stock (NASDAQ: STX) remained steady in after-hours trading following the release of its second-quarter earnings report. The company posted earnings of $3.11 per share, surpassing the analyst consensus of $2.81 by 10.52%. Quarterly revenue reached $2.83 billion, exceeding the Street's estimate of $2.73 billion and showing growth from $2.33 billion in the same period last year. Stay updated on STX's stock movement and further details on the earnings report.
